one_liner: Premium hardcover notebooks with cream-colored, fountain-pen-friendly paper (80gsm+) popular in Argentina
twist_idea: US fountain pen journal with Argentine-style thick cream paper, hardcover, lay-flat binding

one_liner: Professional leather portfolio/organizer with document pockets, card slots, and notepad - executive meeting essential

one_liner: Twist-up liquid glue applicator - neater than bottled glue, stronger than glue sticks

one_liner: Chisel-tip permanent markers with intense pigment, beloved by teachers and artists

one_liner: Correction tape dispensers much more popular than liquid in Argentina - instant, no drying

one_liner: All-metal mechanical pencils (0.5mm) standard in schools, more durable than plastic US versions
